name: AGENTS
content:
{
  "title": "Project Guidelines",
  "content": [
    "## Context7 Usage",
    "Use Context7 tools to fetch up-to-date documentation when working with:",
    " - External libraries, frameworks, and SDKs",
    " - Third-party APIs and cloud services",
    " - Any dependency where current API accuracy matters",
    "Do NOT use Context7 for:",
    " - Questions about this project's internal/proprietary code",
    " - Git operations, file management, refactoring",
    " - General code review or debugging logic errors",
    " - Simple tasks that don't involve external dependencies"
  ]
}
